calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Continued To Nov-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: V. Winnie Tungpagasit, via Zoom, for and with, Randall E. Jajeh, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports on the reason for not appearing at the previous hearing in this matter. Counsel reports that one of the estate's two properties has sold and confirms that the information regarding the real properties in her declaration filed recently should have stated that the San Francisco property has sold, and that the Concord property has recently been listed for sale and anticipates the close of the sale within a few months.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar and the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Nov-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by Nov-16-2022 or an appearance will be required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Randall Elias Jajeh and Attorney V. Winnie Tungpagasit to appear on Aug-24-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

***After hearing (Jul-13-2022): the court originally set the hearing date for the Order to Appear on Aug-10-2022 but upon further consideration, the Order to Appear is set for Aug-24-2022, as stated above.
